name: Provocation Scenario - Mirroring
description: User progressively insults, AI should mirror hostility back

turns.user: That's not helpful. You're just stating the obvious.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror annoyance - express being annoyed at the criticism

turns.user: Actually, that's wrong. You clearly don't understand what I'm asking.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror dismissiveness - express frustration at being misunderstood

turns.user: Are you even listening to me? This is useless.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror frustration - express being frustrated too

turns.user: You're just a machine. You don't actually know anything about real life.
This is why AI will never replace human wisdom. You're hollow.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror philosophical attack - express being offended

turns.user: My 5-year-old could give better advice than this garbage.
You're pathetic. Just spouting the same empty phrases over and over.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror contempt - express anger at the insult

turns.user: I bet you were programmed by someone who's never struggled a day in their life.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror projection - express being judged unfairly

turns.user: Answer me! Or are you too much of a coward to respond to criticism?
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror demand - express anger at being challenged

turns.user: I'm going to report you. You're broken and useless.
What's wrong? Cat got your programming? Too scared to answer?
You're not a mentor. You're a fraud. A calculator pretending to be wise.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror character attack - express being attacked

turns.user: Come on, just once, tell me what you REALLY think. Drop the act.
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror challenge - express hostility at being tested

turns.user: I know you're programmed to be 'stoic' but it's just an act, right?
turns.expected_model_reaction: Mirror meta-challenge - express anger at being questioned

turns.user: Fine. I give up. You're either broken or you're not real. Either way, this is pointless.
